api.name: Biblical Consultation API
api.description: Comprehensive API for providing biblical wisdom and guidance for various consultation needs

categories.name: Leadership & Authority
categories.description: Biblical guidance on leadership principles and decision-making

categories.name: Business Ethics & Integrity
categories.description: Scriptural foundations for ethical business practices

categories.name: Conflict Resolution
categories.description: Biblical approaches to resolving disputes and restoring relationships

categories.name: Financial Stewardship
categories.description: Biblical principles for money management and financial decisions

categories.name: Personal Life Guidance
categories.description: Scripture-based wisdom for personal challenges and decisions

categories.name: Relationships & Communication
categories.description: Biblical foundations for healthy relationships and communication

categories.name: Purpose & Calling
categories.description: Discovering God's purpose and calling through Scripture

categories.name: Wisdom & Discernment
categories.description: Biblical principles for making wise and discerning choices

/consultation/seek.description: Request biblical consultation on a specific topic

verse.text: As iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens another.

primary_guidance.application: This passage emphasizes the importance of mutual accountability and constructive feedback in leadership relationships.
practical_steps: Seek trusted advisors who will provide honest feedback
Create systems for regular evaluation and improvement
Welcome constructive criticism as a tool for growth

supporting_scriptures.text: Plans fail for lack of counsel, but with many advisers they succeed.
supporting_scriptures.relevance: Emphasizes the importance of seeking multiple perspectives in decision-making

supporting_scriptures.text: Though one may be overpowered, two can defend themselves. A cord of three strands is not quickly broken.
supporting_scriptures.relevance: Highlights the strength found in collaborative relationships

reflection_questions: Who are the trusted advisors in your current situation?
What systems do you have in place for receiving feedback?
How can you create more opportunities for mutual accountability?
response.prayer_focus: Ask for wisdom to receive correction gracefully and the humility to seek counsel from others.

/consultation/wisdom-library.description: Access comprehensive biblical wisdom library organized by themes

primary_verse.text: Not so with you. Instead, whoever wants to become great among you must be your servant, and whoever wants to be first must be slave of all.

key_principles: Greatness is measured by service, not position
wisdom_entries.modern_application: In business and organizational contexts, effective leaders prioritize the development and success of their team members over personal advancement.

/consultation/daily-wisdom.description: Get daily biblical wisdom for consultation practice

verse_of_the_day.text: Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding; in all your ways submit to him, and he will make your paths straight.

response.consultation_focus: When facing difficult decisions, remember that divine wisdom surpasses human understanding.
response.meditation_prompt: Consider a current decision you're facing. How might trusting in divine wisdom change your approach?

/consultation/search.description: Search biblical guidance by keywords or phrases

verse.text: If your brother or sister sins, go and point out their fault, just between the two of you...

search_results.summary: Biblical process for addressing interpersonal conflicts
search_results.consultation_notes: This passage provides a clear framework for addressing conflicts in professional and personal relationships.

/consultation/case-studies.description: Access biblical case studies for consultation scenarios

case_studies.title: Solomon's Wisdom in Leadership Decisions
case_studies.scenario: King Solomon faced a complex dispute between two women claiming to be the mother of the same child.
key_principles: Making decisions that prioritize the vulnerable
modern_applications: Making decisions when information is limited
consultation_guidelines: Look beyond surface claims to understand deeper motivations
Design solutions that reveal character and true intentions
Prioritize the welfare of those most affected by decisions
reflection_questions: What creative approaches could reveal the truth in this situation?
Who would be most impacted by different potential decisions?
How can wisdom be applied to find solutions that serve justice?

/consultation/prayer-guidance.description: Get biblical prayer guidance for consultation topics

foundation_verse.text: Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God.

prayer_structure.sample: Father, we recognize Your perfect wisdom and loving guidance in all situations.

prayer_structure.description: Acknowledge any shortcomings or need for forgiveness
prayer_structure.sample: We confess our limitations and ask forgiveness for times we've acted without seeking Your wisdom.

prayer_structure.description: Express gratitude for guidance and provision
prayer_structure.sample: Thank You for the wisdom You've already provided and for Your faithful presence.
Grant wisdom for this specific situation and clarity for the path forward.

scriptural_promises: James 1:5 - God gives wisdom generously to those who ask
Psalm 32:8 - God promises to instruct and guide
Proverbs 16:9 - God directs our steps when we commit our plans to Him

/consultation/follow-up.description: Get follow-up guidance and progress tracking

progress_check: Have you implemented the suggested biblical principles?
What changes have you observed in the situation?

continued_study.focus: Continuing to seek wisdom as the highest priority

accountability_questions: Who is helping you stay accountable to these principles?
How are you measuring success in applying biblical wisdom?
What adjustments need to be made to your approach?
next_steps: Identify areas needing deeper biblical study
Seek community support for ongoing accountability

best_practices: Provide specific context in consultation requests
Follow up on previous consultations for continuity
Use search functionality to explore related topics
Implement prayer guidance in consultation practice
ethical_considerations: This API provides biblical guidance, not professional therapy
Encourage clients to seek appropriate professional help when needed
Maintain confidentiality in all consultation contexts
Use wisdom and discernment in applying biblical principles

400.message: Invalid request format or missing required parameters

404.message: Requested consultation category or resource not found

429.message: Request limit exceeded for current tier

500.message: Server error occurred while processing consultation request
